sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106513" key="u(eli=tis2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑελῖτις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕελος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑελουργεῖον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑελουργός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑελοῦς</orth>, <sense id="n106513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑαλ-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
